prompt: Create a hyper-realistic luxury futuristic portrait of a stylish young woman standing full-body in a glowing Snapchat-inspired social media universe. The subject is a fashionable young woman with long wavy brown hair, centered slightly right, facing forward with a calm confident pose, her face intentionally obscured by a soft square blur. She wears an oversized cream-white streetwear set: loose hoodie with drawstrings and kangaroo pocket, matching jogger cargo pants with side pockets, chunky white-and-beige luxury sneakers, layered gold chain necklaces with a round pendant, gold hoop earrings, and subtle premium accessories. The scene is set on a glossy reflective rooftop or glass platform high above a modern city skyline at golden hour, with warm sunset haze, skyscrapers in soft focus, and yellow light reflecting on the floor. Surround her with exactly 7 floating translucent Snapchat-style yellow holographic UI elements: 1 large glowing ghost logo on the upper left, 1 notification card on the left reading “Notifications” and “Collsar 6 minutes ago” with bell and play icons, 1 square app tile with a ghost logo at lower left, 1 chat bubble card at upper right with a small ghost avatar and three text lines plus an alert badge, 1 small yellow streaking ghost icon near the right side, 1 white outlined chat bubble with pale blue text lines at lower right, and 1 smaller yellow chat bubble overlapping it with two yellow text lines. Use a premium 3D neon aesthetic with glassmorphism, transparent yellow panels, rounded corners, soft bloom, rim lighting, volumetric sunlight, realistic fabric texture, polished reflections, shallow depth of field, and cinematic editorial fashion photography. Color palette should be Snapchat yellow, warm cream, gold, soft beige, and sunset orange. Vertical 3:4 composition, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, luxury social media campaign look, no watermark, no extra text beyond the specified UI labels.
